markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Sam Vinden to Lovable's organic growth strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Dual-Track Strategy:** GrowthX is executing a dual-track strategy to drive organic traffic: a new "Guides" blog and a "Templates" gallery.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [**High-Impact Focus:** The strategy targets a Total Addressable Market (TAM) of 7–10M monthly US desktop searches, starting with high-volume website templates.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [**Critical Site Health Issue:** A site audit revealed users are creating spoofing sites (e.g., for banks), risking a domain-wide flag that would severely impact revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Community-Powered Scaling:** Sam proposed leveraging Lovable's community for scaling, with Marcel suggesting templates and tutorials as the best starting points.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Low Organic Traffic & Site Health Risks

  - [**Poor-Quality "How-To" Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [An existing library of \~2,000 low-quality "how-to" pages creates a poor user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [These pages capture branded search traffic (e.g., "lovable support") but fail to provide useful answers.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Decision:** Redirect pages for critical queries (like support) to the correct destinations to improve user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**Domain Spoofing Risk:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [A technical SEO audit identified users creating spoofing sites (e.g., for banks) on Lovable subdomains.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Risk:** If unaddressed, this could cause the entire `lovable.com` domain to be flagged as "suspicious," severely disrupting revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### The Solution: Dual-Track Organic Growth Engine

  - [**"Guides" Blog:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [A new blog built by GrowthX's design engineering team.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
      - [Content production is 5 articles/week, using AI-ready artifacts (e.g., a detailed feature matrix) to ensure accuracy and scale.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [**"Templates" Gallery:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Start with website templates (7 published, 5/week) to target the highest-volume, lowest-complexity search opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
      - [**Vision:** Build a large library to enable Product Listing Pages (PLPs) for long-tail keywords (e.g., "construction website templates for general contractors"), mirroring the successful Wix model.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### Execution & Scaling

  - [**Current Pace:** 5 guides and 5 templates per week.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [**Scaling Bottleneck:** Template production is complex, requiring a full-time AI engineer and design engineer.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [**GrowthX Capacity:** Can scale guide production to 50/week (based on experience with client Augment Code), but this requires a trade-off with other initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [**Community Contributor Program:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [**Proposal (Sam):** Leverage Lovable's community for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [**Potential Use Cases (Marcel):**](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
          - [**Templates:** Low-effort way for the community to contribute.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
          - [**Tutorials:** A good fit for community-driven content.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
          - [**Guides:** Less suitable due to the high fact-checking and research effort required.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sam Vinden:** Review GrowthX's Notion documentation to get up to speed before starting in December.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Lovable Team:** Finalize internal ownership of organic growth initiatives in December.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Continue executing the dual-track strategy at 5 guides and 5 templates per week.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Implement redirects for critical "how-to" pages to improve user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/nyE37zX2s3zJJwCahR4dxzoejECyEZHc?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
